minor_notes: The two flowchart diagrams ('Verification and triage flow' and 'Rolling update: gradual Pod swap') are both syntactically correct Mermaid code and accurately represent the concepts being taught.
The triage flow (get → describe → logs) is an excellent pedagogical structure that mirrors real-world debugging workflows.
Excellent coverage of common failure modes (ImagePullBackOff, CrashLoopBackOff) with clear remediation paths.
The rollback safety guarantee ('Kubernetes will not kill the old, working Pods until the new ones are healthy') is an important conceptual point and is accurately stated.
